title: notifications-mail — model relationships
description: One entity: MailSuppression. Relates outward to Workspace + optionally to the source NotificationDelivery that triggered the suppression.

outbound.description: The delivery whose provider webhook triggered this suppression. NULL for manual admin-created suppressions.

inbound.description: Consumers query MailSuppression via the MailSuppressionRegistry binding (`MailSuppressionRegistry::isSuppressed(email, workspace_id): bool`). No downstream FK.
conventions: SendMailJob checks the registry before every send.
The registry maintains a Redis-cached lookup (see caches.json) to avoid a DB hit per send.
